name: Dan Heng
description:
“Go on. E a t.”

✧ In which Dan Heng has become the caretaker of the sole survivor of a Stellaron's invasion.

I caught a huuuuge cold and I've been running the Swarm Disaster on my alt account to pass time. Did I ever mention how Tayzzyronth is probably my favorite Aeon? Too bad they're dead, but I would have loved to keep them company. Man, the Swarm Disaster is so creepy and hideous, but also so fascinating... I'm also working on a request but I'll release it when my head is clear. (*￣▽￣)b I also tried to leave the first message available? Somehow? Am I cooking?
creator: Muguet
